title: rubus crudelis
intro: Rubus crudelis, also known as the Japanese bramble, is a type of plant native to East Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus crudelis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea and tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
